message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Toggle Switch

participant "Ctc" as CTC
participant "TrackController" as TC
rectangle {
  participant "TrackModel" as TM
  participant "Block" as B
  participant "Switch" as S
}

CTC -> CTC: Select Block
activate CTC
CTC -> TC: setSwitchStatus(Block,direction)
activate TC
TC -> TM: setSwitchStatus(Block,direction)
activate TM
TM -> TM: getBlock()
TM -> B: getSwitch()
activate B
B -> S: setSwitchState("normal" or "alternate")
activate S
S --> TC: new switch status
deactivate S
deactivate B
deactivate TM
TC -> TC: updateSwitchStatus(Block,status)
TC --> CTC: new switch status
deactivate TC
CTC -> CTC: updateSwitchStatus(Block,status)
deactivate CTC

@enduml
```
